english: Marksman rifles assume there's a marksman in you... not only does this mean that you defeat your targets properly, but that you know when it is time to disengage. I have a special challenge for you: Kill a certain number of people in one raid, while staying below a damage threshold. You might want a secondary weapon to protect you on your way to extract once its done.
main_chinese: 既然叫精确射手步枪，那你就得有个射手的样子……这不光意味着你要把目标干净利落地解决，也意味着你得知道什么时候该脱离战斗。我给你个特别挑战：在单场战局内击杀指定人数，同时把伤害控制在阈值以下。等这事做完、往撤离点走的时候，你最好带把副武器防身。
source_chinese: 既然叫精确射手步枪，那你就得有个射手的样子……这不光意味着你要把目标干净利落地解决，也意味着你得知道什么时候该脱离战斗。我给你个特别挑战：在单场战局内击杀指定人数，同时把伤害控制在阈值以下。等这事做完、往撤离点走的时候，你最好带把副武器防身。

english: You're still working on your melee weapons, are ya? Well then, allow me to give you the biggest challenge I can give. There is a boss here in Tarkov that also uses a melee weapon. main_chinese: 你还在练近战，是吧？那我就给你来个最难的。塔科夫有个也用近战武器的首领，你肯定知道是谁。我打听到一件事，如果你用近战武器干掉他，就能把他的锤子带走。听着怎么样？
source_chinese: 你还在练近战，是吧？那我就给你来个最难的。塔科夫有个也用近战武器的首领，你肯定知道是谁。我打听到一件事，如果你用近战武器干掉他，就能把他的锤子带走。听着怎么样？

english: Very impressive! Enjoy the new hammer, Jack. Though something that rips would be more your style, eh? Ah well. (WARNING: You normally do not have access to this hammer, so while it *technically* works, your character model will freak out and the 'stab' attack does not work. It's really fun though, and holding it actually gives you a speed boost for some reason. Use at your own risk!)
main_chinese: 真够惊人的！好好享受你的新锤子吧，Jack。虽说按你的风格，能撕碎人的家伙可能更适合你，嗯？算了。（警告：正常情况下你是拿不到这把锤子的，所以虽然它*严格来说*能用，但角色模型会抽风，而且“突刺”攻击无效。不过它确实很好玩，而且拿在手里还会莫名其妙给你加移速。风险自负！）
source_chinese: 真够惊人的！好好享受你的新锤子吧，Jack。虽说按你的风格，能撕碎人的家伙可能更适合你，嗯？算了。（警告：正常情况下你是拿不到这把锤子的，所以虽然它*严格来说*能用，但角色模型会抽风，而且“突刺”攻击无效。不过它确实很好玩，而且拿在手里还会莫名其妙给你加移速。风险自负！）

english: Pistols aren't the best choice for most situations, especially if you seperate pistols and revolvers. However, their small size means you can bring one in addition to a main weapon without any issue. They are also quite cheap, and are found frequently. Let's make sure that you'll be able to switch to an effective weapon.
main_chinese: 手枪在大多数情况下都不是最佳选择，尤其是把手枪和左轮手枪分开算的时候更是如此。不过它体积小，带主武器的同时再塞一把也没压力。它们也便宜，还经常能捡到。得确保你切出来的时候，它能真正派上用场。

english: Pistols aren't that great for killing, but they're great for softening up targets, crippling them, leaving then vulenrable for you to finish off later. That being said, any bullet to a head will do just fine. Let's try shooting head, thorax, and legs with these.

english: As you can see, no pistol is effective against medium-high armor, except maybe the 5-7 with the best ammo... but legs can't be armored, making them a great target. The exception to this rule is the Glock18C, which spits out bullets so ungodly fast that it just kinda works anyways. Watch the recoil!

english: Submachine guns are an excellect choice for Tarkov. They are perfect for close quarters, yet can perform decently at medium range. They aren't great for armor penetration, but their high fire rate makes up for it. Depending on the SMG, the recoil can range from rough to non-existent. Good luck!

english: Sub machine guns, with maaybe the exception of the P90, are pretty weak against any high level armour. That means leg shots are going to be the main source of killing when it comes to these things. However, not everyone has good armour, and even those with good armour still have holes in that protection, so thorax shots are perfectly fine as well. And of course, a few headshots never hurt. Get on it.

english: That Sanitar guy... man. You have not seen what he has done, let me tell you. Normally, these boss hunting missions are just a fun challenge, but this... I need you to put this guy down. main_chinese: 那个叫 Sanitar 的家伙……唉。你是没见过他都干了些什么，我跟你说。平时这些猎杀首领的任务也就是图个挑战，可这次不一样……我要你狠狠干掉他。我知道他之后还会活过来，他总会的，但你还是得狠狠干掉他。他对上帝造物做的那些……“研究”，简直亵渎。用他自己的枪杀了他，我要让他记住这次。
source_chinese: 那个叫 Sanitar 的家伙……唉。你是没见过他都干了些什么，我跟你说。平时这些猎杀首领的任务也就是图个挑战，可这次不一样……我要你狠狠干掉他。我知道他之后还会活过来，他总会的，但你还是得狠狠干掉他。他对上帝造物做的那些……“研究”，简直亵渎。用他自己的枪杀了他，我要让他记住这次。

english: Sniper rifles are entirely built for extreme distances. While it's still a large bullet that will hurt like heck at close range, they are meant to be accurate and deadly at ranges that no other weapon can compete in. I'll calculate some shots for you, let's build up a distance. (Explanation of this task: The distance between you and the enemy you shoot will be added to the counter. The further you are from your enemy, the faster you will complete this challenge!)

english: Lethal grenades have various fuses. Some are shorter, some are longer. Short fuses are great for suprising an enemy with a quick grenade, leaving little room for them to leave. Longer fuses are great for throwing further and bouncing around things. The M67 in partiuclar is great for baiting, as the long fuse time makes it more difficult to kill outright but will still force the enemy out. Try out the different fuse times and see what works best for you.

english: Troubleshooting is a lifesaving skill when you're in trouble. The quicker you can identify what's wrong and fix it, the higher chance you can survive a malfunction. You can just run guns that are max durability... but that can get expensive. Besides, if you ever have to pick up a gun, that's likely not going to be at full durability. This is also why it's important to play smart no matter what, as you never know when something can go wrong. Though, if something is to go wrong, you need to know what to do about it. Prove to me you can clear a malfunction.
main_chinese: 武器排障是关键时刻能救命的本事。你越快判断出问题、越快把故障排除，卡壳时活下来的机会就越大。你当然也可以只用满耐久的枪……但那可不便宜。再说了，真要临时捡别人一把枪来用，那把枪多半也不是满耐久。这也是为什么不管什么时候都得打得聪明点，因为你永远不知道枪会在什么时候出岔子。不过真出了问题，你得知道该怎么处理。证明给我看，你能排除一次故障。

english: 'Light, how are you supposed to train my intelligence? Are you going to have me read books or something?' Hahaha... that's a good idea, actually. english: Alright, lets make things more difficult: In war, rarely is there a 'good' side. Sometimes, fighting for either side is wrong. Sometimes, fighting for either side is right. Sometimes, you get a choice which side you'll fight for. Sometimes, mass life or death hangs in the balance of one small thing: Who you tell. Do you do what is right? Is there a 'right?' Or do you tell the one who gives you the rewards you seek?
main_chinese: 好吧，来点更难的：战争里很少真有哪一边是“好的”。有时候，帮哪边都不对；有时候，帮哪边都说得过去。有时候，你甚至能自己选要站哪边。有时候，无数人的生死，就取决于一件小事：你把消息告诉谁。你会去做所谓正确的事吗？真有“正确”这回事吗？还是说，你会把消息交给那个能给你想要报酬的人？

english: We just went and tested all the headsets avaliable in Tarkov. Now, let's see how you fair with the opposite: Sound reduction. Heavy helmets are great for blocking a few rounds, especially from most scavs, but they also block your hearing. Will you fair just as well?

english: I think your hearing is just fine, let's conclude with something satisfying. You got some kills a medium distance a while ago, remember? But with scopes, even long distance can look like point blank range. So here's a challenge: I want you to kill someone that's further than 150 meters away from you. With only iron sights. Yep, no scopes, no reflex sights, no cheating by having iron sights equipped and welding a dovetail on the sight, just pure iron sights. Have fun!

english: Your immune system has gotten a lot stronger through all this! However, it's not the type of thing you 'want' to put to the test. So, let's eliminate the source of the toxin, shall we? Or, more accurately, eliminate those who seek to weaponize it. Those cultists interfere with my work anyways, worshipping whatever satanic deity they do. english: Hey, so... I know I've said a lot about how we're not going to run experiments on your body anymore, and I meant that. I'm sorry in advance for what I have to ask of you next. You see, when a pathogen is in your body that your body doesn't like, it creates antibodies to fight it off. It also keeps a 'record' of the pathogen to be able to fight it off more effectively. The reason people keep getting sick from the 'same' sickness is because it mutates. However, I've noticed that whatever toxin those cultists have created, there's only one strain. It's one specific poison. ...I'm going to judge by the look on your face that you've figured out where this is going. I'm sorry, friend. 5 minutes should be long enough for your body to get enough information on it. Keep yourself alive, alright?
main_chinese: 听着……我知道我之前一直说，不会再拿你的身体做实验了，当时我是真这么想的。先跟你道个歉，接下来我要请你做的事会有点过分。病原体进到体内后，如果你的身体不喜欢它，就会制造抗体去对抗它。同时，它还会“记住”这种病原体，好让下次应付得更有效。人们之所以会反复得“同一种”病，是因为它会变异。不过我注意到，那些邪教徒搞出来的毒素只有一种毒株，就是同一种特定毒物。……看你这表情，我猜你已经知道我要说什么了。抱歉，朋友。5分钟应该足够让你的身体记住它。想办法活下来，好吗？

english: Alright, you want a really challenge? Those bosses around Tarkov, they seem pretty tough. Most got guards or heavy armour, better accuracy, more health... how does more health even work anyways? Ah well, you're gonna knock one down big time. Pick your favorite one around tarkov, and kill him with a melee weapon. Feel free to weaken him with bullets if you must, I'd recommend a flashbang as well, but the killing blow has to come from a melee weapon. Let's see you prove your strength.
main_chinese: 好吧，想来点真正的挑战？塔科夫这些首领看起来都挺硬。大多带着护卫、穿着重甲、打得更准、血还更多……话说，血更多这事到底是怎么实现的？算了。你去狠狠干倒一个。挑你最喜欢的塔科夫首领，用近战武器干掉他。实在不行，可以先用子弹把他打残，我还建议你带颗闪光弹，不过最后一击必须是近战。让我看看你的力量。

english: Pain is a hard sensation to override. It seizes control of you, it makes you want to curl up and hold the afflicted area tightly. It's bad regardless, so you need to learn to fight that sensation off.

english: You have to be careful with a fresh wound. It can get infected, it can start bleeding again, it can swell, there's a whole lot of things that can go on. They heal over time, though. The human body has amazing regenerative capabilities. However, no one in Tarkov is going to wait a few days for you to 'get well'. It's only something to take advantage of here. Show them that you don't need to wait.
main_chinese: 新伤口得小心处理。它会感染，会重新出血，会肿起来，总之什么都可能发生。不过随着时间过去，它终究会愈合。人体的再生能力真是惊人。可在塔科夫，没人会等你养上几天再“康复”。在这里，能做的只有把这点当成优势用起来。让他们看看，你根本不用等。

english: I can read your thoughts, by the way. I'm not sadistic, this isn't a pleasure for me. I'm here to train you to survive in Tarkov for a greater purpose. I understand why you feel that way though, I hope you can forgive me. I have one more thing to ask of you, anyways. Oh, and good job surviving out there while wounded. Getting beat up does not make it any easier to fight back
main_chinese: 顺便一提，我能读到你的想法。我不是施虐狂，这对我来说一点都不享受。我训练你在塔科夫活下去，是为了更大的目的。我明白你为什么会这么想，希望你能原谅我。不过我还有最后一件事想拜托你。还有，带着伤还能在外头活下来并狠狠干回去，做得不错。挨打从来不会让还手变得更容易。

english: More, more! Not just blood, not just broken bones, I want everything!! Do you even know what its like watching you die so many times? Do you even know you're dying? How many times can you die so painfully, so slowly, and still go out there guns blazing? What is wrong with you? You have to know how to use EVERYTHING to keep yourself alive!
main_chinese: 更多，还要更多！不只是血，不只是骨折，我全都要！！你知道我看着你死了那么多次是什么滋味吗？你到底知不知道自己正在死？你还能那样痛、那样慢地死上多少次，然后转头又端着枪冲出去？你到底怎么回事？你必须学会用上一切手段让自己活着！

english: Yes! Thank you. Keep yourself alive, for your own sake? I wasn't kidding when I said I don't like seeing you die. If I haven't told you already, I don't particularly care for blood and death and corpses, not least the blood and corpse of someone I'm suppose to be helping. Having to watch you die all the time is painful... so die less, alright?
main_chinese: 对，就是这样！谢谢你。为了你自己，也尽量活下来，好吗？我说我不喜欢看你死，可不是开玩笑。我本来就不喜欢血、死亡和尸体，更别提那还是一个我本该帮助的人流的血、变成的尸体。总看着你死，真的很难受……所以，少死几次，好吗？

english: The art of moving silently is a lot less artistic when you're carrying the weight of dead men's souls on your back. Oh, also their guns and gear. Regardless, knowing how to move quietly will save your life more often than you think. Especially if those you are fighting are more... SAIN than usual, if you know what I mean. Learn how to kill your enemey without them knowing where it came from. Let's start easily, with the assistance of the night.
main_chinese: 背上扛着死人留下的一切时，悄无声息地移动可就没什么“艺术感”了。哦，还有他们的枪和装备。不管怎么说，学会安静行动，救你命的次数会比你想的更多。尤其是当你要对付的家伙比平时更……SAIN一点时，你懂我意思吧。学会在敌人还没反应过来攻击从哪来的时候就把他放倒。先从简单的开始，让夜色帮你一把。

Not only are most of these ways helpful for movement, but sometimes it's advantages for killing, getting a good angle on your opponent. Let's see just how well you can take advantage of the terrain around you.

english: Alright, we've gotten plenty of practice, and I've shown you everything there is to be learned about stealth. Now, I have a fun challenge for you. Go to the customs or the mall, and kill three of those PMC guys. The catch? You can't get hurt whatsoever. If you get shot once, you gotta retry. If you break your leg, that's not quiet enough, and you're an idiot. I'd say 'Godspeed' to you, but that won't help this time.
main_chinese: 好了，练得已经够多了，关于潜行能教你的我也都教完了。现在我给你个有意思的挑战。去海关或者商场，干掉那帮PMC里的三个。条件？你一点伤都不能受。只要中一枪，就得重来。要是摔断了腿，那说明你还不够安静，而且你蠢。我本来想祝你“顺风”，但这次恐怕没用。
source_chinese: 好了，练得已经够多了，关于潜行能教你的我也都教完了。现在我给你个有意思的挑战。去海关或者商场，干掉那帮PMC里的三个。条件？你一点伤都不能受。只要中一枪，就得重来。要是摔断了腿，那说明你还不够安静，而且你蠢。我本来想祝你“顺风”，但这次恐怕没用。

english: The night is now yours, you strike all and are seen by none. A myth, an urban legend. The spectre of Tarkov. Unfortunately for you, the night doesn't last forever. Sometimes, it isn't even an option. Can the spectre haunt during the day, or will the sun protect the inhabitants of Tarkov?

english: Why do all this work yourself when you can have machines do it for you over time? I mean, let's ignore the fact that crafting seems to already happen automatically here; don't worry about that. Let's try *actual* automation, letting the station truly do it for you. There's three available in your hideout; put each of them to work.

english: Y'know... armour is really only as good as the plate you put into it. Those big vests you wore for me last time... what did you have in them? Were you able to find nice, tier 6 plates? Or did you have to settle for some tier 4? Well, either way, let's get you some tier 6 ones. There's quite a few, each with different properties. Can you find one of each? I don't expect them brand new, don't worry. Take 'em off someone you kill, or not. Heck, if you wanna cheat, get em from a vendor or the market. The goal is to supply you with good protection, so, whatever accomplishes that.

english: Taking care of your weapons is by far one of the best things you can do to improve your chances of survival in Tarkov. They're what's keeping you alive, so you should keep them alive, too! To do this, though, you'll need the right tools. I'm sure there's some sort of repair kit out there, right? Normally I wouldn't fuss about whether it's brand new or 'found in raid' or whatever, but this is important enough that you should find, or craft, it yourself.

english: Have you ever used a weapon for so long that it barely works anymore? It jams, it breaks down, it misfires, it just shouldn't be relied upon for combat. Sometimes, studying such a weapon can be of great value for understanding future weapon repairs, as well as being a grim reminder of what can happen if you don't take proper care of your firearm. Try wearing a weapon down to scrap. You might want to bring another weapon in while you do this...
main_chinese: 你有没有一把枪用到几乎报废过？卡壳、故障、哑火，已经完全不该拿去打仗。研究这种武器，有时候对理解以后该怎么修枪很有价值，同时它也能残酷地提醒你，不好好保养枪会是什么下场。试着把一把武器磨到废铁吧。做这事时你最好再带一把备用枪……
source_chinese: 你有没有一把枪用到几乎报废过？卡壳、故障、哑火，已经完全不该拿去打仗。研究这种武器，有时候对理解以后该怎么修枪很有价值，同时它也能残酷地提醒你，不好好保养枪会是什么下场。试着把一把武器磨到废铁吧。做这事时你最好再带一把备用枪……

english: Have you ever seen a disassembled weapon before? I sure hope you have, given that you are a trained military guy and all that. Being able to identify various weapon parts is critical to being able to effectively repair your weapon. Try taking some weapons apart, or even better, try finding some new ones in raid. Buy a VPO-209 from Skier and deconstruct it at your workbench, see what you get.

english: Say what you will about Tarkov, this is real life we're talking about. Your magazines don't magically combine like the video games you grew up on. Here, you gotta take care of them. That means you gotta get good at loading, unloading, and switching mags fast. We'll start off with the lil 10 rounders. Let's do one kill for each bullet you can hold.
main_chinese: 别人怎么说塔科夫随他们去，但我们现在说的是现实。你的弹匣不会像你小时候玩的电子游戏里那样自己合并。到了这里，弹匣得自己照顾。这意味着你得熟练掌握装弹、退弹和快速换弹。我们就从小小的 10 发弹匣开始吧。弹匣能装几发，就给我拿几个人头。
source_chinese: 别人怎么说塔科夫随他们去，但我们现在说的是现实。你的弹匣不会像你小时候玩的电子游戏里那样自己合并。到了这里，弹匣得自己照顾。这意味着你得熟练掌握装弹、退弹和快速换弹。我们就从小小的 10 发弹匣开始吧。弹匣能装几发，就给我拿几个人头。
review_note: Main mirror matches the manually reviewed source locale entry.

english: Starting small
main_chinese: 从小容量开始
source_chinese: 从小容量开始

english: Less is more, they say. If you have a 10 round magazine, it's lighter, likely more ergonomic, and most importantly will cause you to think more carefully about your shots. In that way, a 10 round magazine can be way more effective than a larger one.
main_chinese: 不是都说少即是多吗？10 发弹匣更轻，通常也更符合人体工学，最重要的是它会逼你更认真地斟酌每一枪。从这个角度看，10 发弹匣有时反而比大弹匣更有效。
source_chinese: 不是都说少即是多吗？10 发弹匣更轻，通常也更符合人体工学，最重要的是它会逼你更认真地斟酌每一枪。从这个角度看，10 发弹匣有时反而比大弹匣更有效。
review_note: Main mirror matches the manually reviewed source locale entry.

english: The 10 rounders were nice, but sometimes that's just not enough ammo to seal the deal. Let's double the amount of bullets we can use, how about that? Still low enough that you'll be a little more careful, but plenty incase you miss a few or if the enemy is heavily armoured.
main_chinese: 10 发弹匣挺不错，但有时候火力就是不太够。那我们把可用弹量翻个倍，怎么样？20 发依旧少到足以让你保持谨慎，但也足够应付几枪打偏，或者敌人穿着重甲的时候。

english: Alright, now let's get used to what you're most commonly be working with. Normally I'd stick with the whole 'one kill per capacity' thing, but 30 round magazines are standard issue, so I think it's the most important capacity to be familiar with. How about you double what you'd normally do?

english: Hot take: If you need 60 round magazines, you either found yourself in a REALLY bad situation, or you need to work on your aim. Oh well, they exist, and sometimes you just really need to suppress a location. Don't waste all your ammo, though! That stuff can be expensive.

english: Tarkov, being real life, is a rather unique place. It turns out that getting shot has consequences. Who'dve thought, right? If you're going to get shot, it's going to mess you up, and you need to know how to get yourself back in working order. First, we need the right tools. Go get some surgical kits, a few of each.

english: You know, so far these tasks have been sort of... out of your control, I guess? Like, you could just be jumping off buildings to do this, but I don't imagine you're doing that very often, that's no fun. So, how about a different kind of surgical? It's technically cheating, but hey, I really can only think of so many ways to make training surgery interesting. We'll get back to the grind next task, but let's have some fun for a bit, ok? I want 8 headshots, with bolt-actions, in the same raid. That's quite surgical, eh?

english: I hope last task was a little more enjoyable, a nice break from what we're doing. Unfortunately, there's really only one way I can actually train you on your surgery... and that's to do surgery. So, being the final task, I really have no choice but to do it that way. I highly recommend letting this one happen naturally, it will over time. You're not missing out by not completing your training, if you think about it. If you don't need to be performing surgery, you don't need to be an expert in surgery. It's up to you if you even want to go for it, honestly.
main_chinese: 希望上个任务你做得开心点，算是我们这堆事里的小休息。可惜，真要训练你的手术能力，我实际上只有一种办法……那就是去做手术。所以既然这是最后一个任务，我也只能这样来。老实说，我强烈建议你顺其自然，时间久了总会完成。不把这项训练练满，你也没损失什么，换个角度想想也是。要是你根本用不着动手术，那你也没必要成为什么手术专家。说真的，要不要特意去做，全看你自己。

english: I had a fun idea, as a test of your current intelligence. Are you able to identify differneces between what seems to be identical things? If I were to give you the same quest 7 times, but only one was the 'true' one, would you be able to figure it out? There's no penalty for failure, but you will be rewarded if you succeed. You only get one try, though, so take your time!

english: Does it get tiring holding that gun up all the time? Espeically if you're waiting for the other person to come to you, you could run out of stamina at the wrong time... you should try bracing your weapon against something. A wall, a box, a bipod, a ledge, there's a lot of places you can set up. Helps with the recoil too! Go give that a try.
main_chinese: 一直端着枪很累吧？尤其是等别人来找你的时候，体力说不定会在最糟的时候见底……你该试试把武器支在什么东西上。墙边、箱子、两脚架、矮沿，能架枪的地方可不少。后坐力也会好控制些。去试试看吧。
source_chinese: 一直端着枪很累吧？尤其是等别人来找你的时候，体力说不定会在最糟的时候见底……你该试试把武器支在什么东西上。墙边、箱子、两脚架、矮沿，能架枪的地方可不少。后坐力也会好控制些。去试试看吧。

english: Stocks are an invaluable tool when it comes to assisting in recoil control. Instead of leaving it all to your hands, your shoulder and really your entire body can help absorb it. Let's take that away, shall we? You have to use an assault rifle, by the way. No cheating by using something that already has no stock!
main_chinese: 枪托在后坐力控制上价值极大。不是全靠双手硬吃后坐力，你的肩膀，甚至整个身体，都能帮你分担。那我们就把它拿掉，怎么样？顺便说一句，你得用突击步枪，别耍赖去拿本来就没枪托的东西。
source_chinese: 枪托在后坐力控制上价值极大。不是全靠双手硬吃后坐力，你的肩膀，甚至整个身体，都能帮你分担。那我们就把它拿掉，怎么样？顺便说一句，你得用突击步枪，别耍赖去拿本来就没枪托的东西。

english: Stocks. Foregrips. Both important, right? You poor soul. Use every single one. You have to kill a PMC as well, no picking on the scavs. Enjoy the suffering!
main_chinese: 枪托。前握把。都很重要，对吧？你可真倒霉。把每一种都给我用一遍。而且这次必须杀 PMC，别去拿 Scav 充数。好好享受这份痛苦吧！
source_chinese: 枪托。前握把。都很重要，对吧？你可真倒霉。把每一种都给我用一遍。而且这次必须杀 PMC，别去拿 Scav 充数。好好享受这份痛苦吧！

english: Suffer.
main_chinese: 受苦吧。
source_chinese: 受苦吧。

english: I can't believe you actually did this. Are you insane? What the heck. You must really, really care about recoil control. Well, good job. ...you want something for it? What, I'm an angel. Uhm... here, there's a little something in the corner of your shelter you never noticed. Go grab that.
main_chinese: 我真不敢相信你居然真做到了。你疯了吗？搞什么鬼。你对后坐力控制还真是执着。干得不错。……还想要点奖励？怎么，我可是天使。嗯……这样吧，你藏身处角落里有个你一直没注意到的小东西，去拿走吧。
source_chinese: 我真不敢相信你居然真做到了。你疯了吗？搞什么鬼。你对后坐力控制还真是执着。干得不错。……还想要点奖励？怎么，我可是天使。嗯……这样吧，你藏身处角落里有个你一直没注意到的小东西，去拿走吧。

english: The final search quest... ...hmm. Alright, let's go non-canon for a bit. Consider the 4th wall broken, player, cause I'm gonna tell you exactly how this works. I have hidden a wooden cross somewhere in Tarkov. Dynamic Maps can't find it, and the location moves on each update, unless no one has found it yet. I'll provide you the map it's on and a single hint. Good luck. (CURRENT MAP: Customs. CURRENT HINT: 'In a building where many have been deceived')
main_chinese: 最后一个搜索任务……嗯。好吧，咱们这次稍微跳出设定。玩家，就当第四面墙已经破了，因为我要直接告诉你这任务怎么运作。我把一枚木十字架藏在了塔科夫某处。Dynamic Maps找不到它，而且每次更新它的位置都会变，除非还没人找到。我要告诉你它在哪张地图上，再给你一个提示。祝你好运。（当前地图：海关。当前提示：‘在一栋让许多人上当的建筑里’）
source_chinese: 最后一个搜索任务……嗯。好吧，咱们这次稍微跳出设定。玩家，就当第四面墙已经破了，因为我要直接告诉你这任务怎么运作。我把一枚木十字架藏在了塔科夫某处。Dynamic Maps找不到它，而且每次更新它的位置都会变，除非还没人找到。我要告诉你它在哪张地图上，再给你一个提示。祝你好运。（当前地图：海关。当前提示：‘在一栋让许多人上当的建筑里’）
